mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalInteractions, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_id) AS uniqueVisitors, IFNULL(AVG(response_time_ms), 0) AS avgResponseTimeMs, IFNULL(AVG(feedback_score), 0) AS avgSatisfaction, SUM(IF(interaction_type = 'text', 1, 0)) AS textCount, SUM(IF(interaction_type = 'voice', 1, 0)) AS voiceCount FROM manage_visitor_interaction WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
AND scenic_id = #{scenicId}

SELECT #{scenicId} AS scenicId, #{date} AS statDate, COUNT(*) AS totalInteractions, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_id) AS uniqueVisitors, IFNULL(AVG(response_time_ms), 0) AS avgResponseTimeMs, IFNULL(AVG(feedback_score), 0) AS avgSatisfaction, SUM(IF(interaction_type = 'text', 1, 0)) AS textCount, SUM(IF(interaction_type = 'voice', 1, 0)) AS voiceCount FROM manage_visitor_interaction WHERE DATE(create_time) = #{date}
AND scenic_id = #{scenicId}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalInteractions, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_id) AS uniqueVisitors, IFNULL(AVG(response_time_ms), 0) AS avgResponseTimeMs, IFNULL(AVG(feedback_score), 0) AS avgSatisfaction, CONCAT('[', GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT CONCAT('"', IFNULL(intent_type, 'other'), '"') ), ']') AS intentTypes, CONCAT('{', '"positive":', SUM(IF(emotion_detected = 'positive', 1, 0)), ',', '"neutral":', SUM(IF(emotion_detected = 'neutral', 1, 0)), ',', '"negative":', SUM(IF(emotion_detected = 'negative', 1, 0)), '}') AS emotionDistribution FROM manage_visitor_interaction WHERE DATE(create_time) = #{date}
AND scenic_id = #{scenicId}
